content_body:
Thank you for providing such a beautiful place to serve as our "home base" during Emory's graduation weekend! We appreciate your patience with us getting used to the alarm systems, too. Love the neighborhood and all of the fun things to do in the area - we especially enjoyed the close access to Piedmont Park, Historic Old 4th Ward Park, great grocery stores and the Atlanta Beltline!

Thanks again.
title: Graduation Weekend at Emory in Atlanta, Georgia
